programme.title: Rich Kids Go Skint
programme.desc: Sophie, a privileged woman who loves cash rather than kids, is sent to stay with Pete, Mandy and five youngsters. She also has to help Pete in his job, working with children

programme.title: Bargain-Loving Brits in the Sun
programme.desc: Katie-Louise, who runs a buy-and-sell website for ex-pats, is on a mission to persuade businesses to donate for a charity auction to play out live on the radio. Meanwhile, Geoff, who has become the very first Mr Whippy of Benidorm, having bought a van and fitted it out with a soft ice cream machine, faces a potentially terminal problem when his generator blows up

programme.title: Paddington Station 24/7
programme.desc: A member of the public puts his life at risk by running along the tracks, and the station grinds to a halt as all trains are on hold to protect the intruder. New overhead cables are being installed in Newbury as part of the multi-million pound electrification of the Great Western route, but the pressure is on for the engineers who work in teams around the clock to install the new wires

programme.title: Filthy House SOS
programme.desc: Cleaning duo Jon and Brennan take on some of Britain's filthiest and most cluttered homes. Mum-of-three Geraldine is overwhelmed by a sea of clutter in her three-bedroom house

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: Some sleuthing from the road crime team in North Yorkshire uncovers a kitchen where forgers are turning out Scottish £20 notes, while equally dogged investigating leads officers to a man using multiple fake number plates across his fleet of vehicles in an attempt to avoid detection of his numerous offences. Meanwhile, a classic high-speed pursuit and tactical stop on the motorway is undertaken to catch criminals who have stolen a boiler from a plumber's merchant

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: In Bradford, a stolen car speeds at 100mph through the city as police officers track and pursue it, then forcibly stop the delinquent driver. In Leeds, a car grabs the attention of cops because where they expect to see a middle-aged woman driving, there is instead a teenager

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: The dog unit embarks on a desperate manhunt amid fears that an armed and dangerous character is roaming the streets of Lincoln, while Craggy closes in on a suspected shoplifter with a bag full of surprises. Officers from Lincolnshire's Roads Policing Unit also tackle a would-be stunt rider and a boozed-up biker who is raising hell on the A-roads

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: A case of drink-driving leads to a hot pursuit on the city streets and carnage on the country roads, while a routine stop for speeding gives a lone female officer a worrying surprise. As devastating storms batter the UK, the helicopter crew is called out to rescue a woman trapped by deadly rising river water

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Sgt Jon Moon and his police dog Kanto follow a trail of broken glass and spilt alcohol, leading to a confrontation with a robber wielding a nasty-looking knife. Elsewhere, a fight in a club ends with one man in handcuffs and another in hospital, Barry Peach plays catch-up as a teenage driver tears up the streets of Skegness, and Jon Peacock detects a whiff of cannabis in a quiet rural village

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts
programme.desc: With the computer system down, the staff resort to a whiteboard to keep track of everyone. Patients include an elderly man due to fly to Cyprus in two days, a former miner with breathing difficulties, a youngster with a footballing injury and a case of suspected meningitis. Plus, volunteer Jane Allen struggles when tasked with stashing a stationery delivery in the quiet room

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Paul refuses to accept fault for Brent's actions, and Harlow is worried. Sheila C hires Ned to give her art lessons, which does not go unnoticed by Bea

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Mac feels awful, and suffers from cramps as she collapses. Justin starts abusing painkillers and takes them too often. Nikau's plan to get rid of Chloe and Ryder is put into effect

programme.title: Bargain Loving Brits in Blackpool
programme.desc: DJ Jason Fubar is hanging up his headphones to overhaul a bar on Blackpool prom, but his tight £10,000 budget means calling in favours and doing lots of the work himself. In Skegness, 1960s-themed B&B owner Lorraine's hopes of impressing first-time visitors from Filey hang in the balance when her matching linen is stolen

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts
programme.desc: A mini-heatwave results in an influx of patients at Barnsley Hospital. 50-year-old Mark is rushed into the emergency department after an accident involving a garden shredder, while three-year-old Ophelia is brought in by her dad after a mishap with a sun cream bottle. Elsewhere, doctors treat 64-year-old Melvin, who suffers from the incurable lung condition COPD, and 27-year-old Jack is assessed after collapsing at work

programme.title: 999: Critical Condition
programme.desc: Helen has an aneurysm in her brain that could burst at any time and lead to her death within minutes. For doctor Sanjeev Nayak there are no second chances as he embarks on an extraordinary operation to save his patient. Michael's life is also on a knife edge. After collapsing with a cardiac arrest, he was saved by a neighbour giving him CPR. But now the trauma doctors face a double battle - they must quickly assess his head injury and also remove a clot in his artery that is destroying his heart

programme.title: A&E After Dark
programme.desc: Security are called to an incident in the Minors waiting room after a violent argument begins between two patients, while 47-year-old factory worker Mark arrives after an industrial accident tore the muscle and skin away from his wedding ring finger. Ian arrives in Resus with a worrying head injury after the 63-year-old fell down a full flight of stairs late at night and Dr Jehad must establish if he has a life-threatening bleed on the brain

programme.title: Ambulance: Code Red
programme.desc: A West Midlands critical care team is called to a road traffic accident in which a 13-year-old boy has been knocked over on the way to school, and now has blood coming out of one ear

programme.title: The Sex Business
programme.desc: Providing sexual services in their own homes, escorts are one of the biggest growth areas in the British sex business. This episode follows three independent escorts, each of whom pride themselves on being in control, and say they enjoy the luxury of selling sex out of choice rather than necessity

programme.title: Countdown to Murder
programme.desc: Documentary examining the murder of Janet Scott, who was killed by her partner, Simon Mellors, a man who had been hiding a dark and violent secret - he had spent the last 14 years in prison for the murder of his ex-partner. In the months leading up to her death, Simon showered Janet with gifts and attention, but their relationship drastically changed when Simon became increasingly controlling of who she saw, her home and her life. Feeling suffocated, Janet decided to end things, with fatal consequences

programme.title: The Disappearance
programme.desc: With the mystery behind the disappearance finally becoming clear, the police and the Sullivan family face a race against time. Drama, starring Peter Coyote

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Paul refuses to accept fault for Brent's actions, and Harlow is worried. Sheila C hires Ned to give her art lessons, which does not go unnoticed by Bea

programme.title: Home and Away

programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: Rich Kids Go Skint
programme.desc: Jacob is the 19-year-old student son of millionaires, whose Chelsea flat was a gift from his parents. He goes to live with a cash-strapped couple in Manchester and their three children, and discovers that their weekly food budget matches one of his restaurant meals

programme.title: Bargain-Loving Brits in the Sun
programme.desc: Another glimpse into the lives of expats who have left the UK for a new life in the Spanish sun. Cabaret star Mark - who appears on stage as Ruby Rox - films a video to play as part of his show, and sisters Vina and Nilam launch a business selling spice kits so expats can make their own curries. Tattoo artists Blane and Mark are in need of more customers, while retiree and metal detector enthusiast Stan spends his evenings searching the beaches for small change

programme.title: Paddington Station 24/7
programme.desc: The heat causes a fault in vital signalling equipment at Didcot, resulting in a points failure - and incident controller Greg has to react fast to prevent any snarl-ups. Cornwall engineers deal with a historic, but urgent, issue with increasingly unstable lines built in the 1860s in need of repair. The £1.5m project includes laying three concrete beams, the largest of which is 51 tonnes, to support the tracks, but, with just five nights to complete the works, it is a race against the clock to get job done

programme.title: Filthy House SOS
programme.desc: Cleaning duo Richard and Brennan take on some of Britain's filthiest and most cluttered homes. They begin with Lincolnshire single mum, Sam, who has dedicated her life to caring for her disabled daughter, leaving no time for cleaning

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: North Yorkshire's road crime team chases a gang stealing 4x4s from industrial estates every night, while West Yorkshire traffic cops pursue stolen vehicles across Bradford. In Leeds, a 19-year-old risks running across a busy road to meet his girlfriend and the resulting incident requires the full range of emergency services - including an air ambulance - to be deployed to try to save his life

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: North Yorkshire is considered a soft touch by criminals, who using the county's rural back roads to operate under cover of darkness. In this edition, the team's elite officers hunt down and arrest burglars, drug dealers and thieves. Jamie Theakston narrates

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Officers step in to deal with a rowdy reveller when things get out of hand on New Year's Eve in Lincoln city centre, while Suzie Ranyard catches out a motorist who claims he has been driving with a dodgy number plate for 18 years. Jon Moon arrests a shoplifter more than happy to admit to his crime and a young lad discovers how hard it is to pull the wool over the eyes of Jon Peacock

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Brian Conville gives a man a dressing-down for dangerous driving on the school run, and Barry Peach's detective skills come to the fore when he apprehends a fugitive who has been using a false identity. Meanwhile, during an initiative to clamp down on rural crime, officers from Lincolnshire's Roads Policing Unit find themselves pursuing some stolen tractors

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Jon Moon and his dog Kanto are hot on the heels of some burglary suspects, while spot-checks by the unit on the A1 turn up a carrier bag full of cash. Jason Baxter rushes to the scene of an accident where the driver was thrown clear of the car, only for another crash to take place - this time involving a line of vehicles

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts
programme.desc: Doctors in the accident and emergency department treat a patient in cardiac arrest. Junior doctor George Kay leads the resus team, while Hannah Ryan steps in to head up the nurses. Meanwhile, cyclist Garry is rushed into hospital after a head-on collision with a metal gate, and elderly patient Larry comes to hospital with his wife Molly after he had a fall at home

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: The two Sheilas bond over family, and Hendrix signs up to help Mackenzie move Toadie's office, but makes a move that puts their friendship at risk

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Mac's incident turns out to be benign, but she needs mental health aid. Lewis gets into a fateful fight with Christian after losing his temper

programme.title: Filthy House SOS
programme.desc: The monumental task of cleaning the home of Andrew in Norfolk, who has filled his cluttered home with toys, models and computers. There are cat faeces throughout, and an infestation of bugs in the kitchen

programme.title: Rich Holiday, Poor Holiday
programme.desc: A group of wealthy friends from Guildford, who usually fly the globe together in search of sophisticated cultural experiences, take on a fast-paced budget Benidorm break. Meanwhile, party lovers from London who save every year to go to Benidorm together find themselves in the lap of luxury on a trip that sees them in the slowpaced confines of a five-star Caribbean hotel on the island of St Lucia. Each holiday is exactly what the respective groups normally avoid

programme.title: Cocktail (1988)
programme.desc: An ambitious bartender and his mentor become the talk of New York before their differences drive them apart. Relocating in Jamaica, the barman is torn between the waitress he loves and a wealthy older woman who can make his dreams of running his own establishment come true. Drama, starring Tom Cruise, Bryan Brown, Elisabeth Shue and Lisa Banes

Horror sequel, starring Jennifer Love Hewitt, Freddie Prinze Jnr, Brandy Norwood and Mekhi Phifer

programme.title: Dirty John
programme.desc: Debra has a seemingly perfect life, but she is lacking love. When she meets the handsome John Meehan, could things be looking up?

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: American serial killer Bill Suff, who is thought to have murdered between 12 and 22 people during an 18-year spree. Described as a mild-mannered loner, Suff raped, stabbed, strangled, and sometimes mutilated prostitutes in California, beginning in 1986. In January 1992, he was arrested after a routine traffic stop

programme.title: Countdown to Murder
programme.desc: The case of Carol Taggart, a 54-year-old mother of three, who has seemingly been murdered by her own son in Scotland

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: When one of her friends is charged with murdering her abusive husband, Jessica sets about proving her innocence and comes up with a list of suspects including the victim's mistress and stepson. Angela Lansbury stars

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: As Gibbs recovers from his gunshot wound, the team is called in to investigate the killing of a US Marine and tries to determine whether the crime is related to an alleged case of blackmail at an illegal nightclub. Drama, starring Mark Harmon

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A former US Navy Seal escapes from prison, intent on finding his wife's real murderer. The break-out sparks a race against time as the NCIS team tries to reach him before he exacts revenge. Mark Harmon, David McCallum and Sasha Alexander star

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the shooting of a singer's wife, questioning the man's manager - who proves to have formerly owned the murder weapon. Meanwhile, an unscrupulous defence lawyer embarks on a smear campaign against the victim. Gary Busey guest stars

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The team discovers a former fingerprint examiner may have provided false testimony to help the prosecution in several court cases. To make matters worse, it transpires that Van Buren earned her promotion thanks to two of these fraudulent convictions. Award-winning police drama, starring S Epatha Merkerson

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: First of a three-part story. The team investigates when the headless corpse of a film studio executive is found floating in a river, and her personal trainer and ex-husband soon prove likely suspects. Sam Waterston stars

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: When an 11-year-old girl is found suffocated to death in Central Park, Briscoe and Green discover her adoptive mother's attempts to discipline the child may have inadvertently caused the tragedy. However, the case is thrown into confusion when a post-mortem reveals she may actually have died of an allergic reaction. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A high-school student is found dead in an apartment building, and Briscoe and Green suspect an improper website may have played a part in her murder. As McCoy and Southerlyn investigate the case further, they realise the victim's best friend, who was reluctant to come forward as a witness, may provide the answers. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach, Jesse L Martin and Elisabeth Rohm

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The detectives probe the shooting of a motorist, and arrest a man who helped the victim change a tyre on his car shortly before he was killed. The suspect protests his innocence, and points the investigators in the direction of another man who admits to the crime and even signs a confession, but further inquiries cast doubt on his guilt. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Benjamin Bratt

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs and his team are called in to investigate the murder of a fellow NCIS agent. Seemingly aware that he was about to be killed, the victim is known to have swallowed a memory card relating to a cold case he was working on. Tony goes undercover to glean more information - and gets the surprise of his life. Mark Harmon and Michael Weatherly star

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team investigates the disappearance of a US Marine and discovers three former members of his unit have recently died. Digging deeper, evidence is uncovered suggesting the commander may be a serial killer who preys on his own men. Drama, starring Mark Harmon

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The remains of a US Marine are found impaled on a tree stump in a forest, where Tony discovers a shell from a multi-purpose assault weapon. The investigation leads to a pawn shop - where evidence of a botched illegal arms deal is uncovered. Mark Harmon stars

programme.title: L.A.'s Finest
programme.desc: After a stunning discovery. Syd and McKenna debate who they can trust, while also investigating a death that took place at a scenic Los Angeles park

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: A prison warden is attacked while delivering a ransom payment to secure the release of his wife, who was allegedly kidnapped 10 years previously. Eames and Goren investigate - and discover the missing woman is actually living happily with an escaped prisoner

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: When a police officer's son is murdered by the Mob, it is not long before Logan and Barek realise he was not the intended target. Their investigation leads them to two rival Mafia families, but it soon becomes apparent a more sinister plot involving police corruption is waiting to be unveiled

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A serial rapist is murdered and his body is left bound and gagged in the same fashion as the women he attacked. Suspecting the killer may be one of the criminal's former victims, Mac and the team are left with mixed feelings about bringing the culprit to justice. Crime drama, starring Gary Sinise

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: An unidentified woman found dead in an alleyway appears to have taken a heroin overdose, but further inspection reveals someone may have had a hand in administering the fatal drugs. Mac recognises the victim as conspiracy-obsessed Tessa James, and as he works to explore whether there was truth in her stories, the investigation leads to an elite gentlemen's club that has traces of blood on the walls. Starring Gary Sinise and Sela Ward

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: The author poses as a college professor so he can investigate the gruesome murder of a student, but he and Beckett soon discover dark secrets the university wants to keep hidden

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: A famously reclusive author turns up dead and Castle is determined to solve his hero's murder, but he and Beckett discover that truth is stranger than fiction as they dig deeper

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice. The programme reveals how essential surveillance cameras have become in the fight against crime and features footage of people caught red-handed

programme.desc: While promoting her new mystery novel in Las Vegas, Jessica investigates the murder of a casino manager and sets out to prove a friend's partner is not guilty of the crime. Guest starring Howard Keel (Dallas) and David Soul (Starsky and Hutch), with Angela Lansbury as the amateur sleuth

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team investigates the disappearance of a US Marine and discovers three former members of his unit have recently died. Digging deeper, evidence is uncovered suggesting the commander may be a serial killer who preys on his own men. Drama, starring Mark Harmon

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The remains of a US Marine are found impaled on a tree stump in a forest, where Tony discovers a shell from a multi-purpose assault weapon. The investigation leads to a pawn shop - where evidence of a botched illegal arms deal is uncovered. Mark Harmon stars

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green are called in to identify the charred remains of a woman caught in an apartment block fire, which was started deliberately. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: McCoy and Southerlyn battle the lawyers over the fatal shooting of an uninvited nightclub guest who was seen confronting popular rap star Darry 'G-Trane' moments before the murder. Award-winning police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Elisabeth Rohm

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Part two of three. A witness reveals that personal trainer Newman flew to Los Angeles on the night of the murder, leading the officers to believe they have the wrong man. When blood matching the dead film studio executive's is found in their new suspect's car, they soon arrest him but their case may not be clear-cut enough to warrant a conviction. Sam Waterston stars

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the murder of an investment analyst whose dealings with a bankrupt company left many clients penniless. Overcoming initial problems with identifying the victim, they pick up on a clue that leads them to the dead man's attorney, who was apparently the last person to see him alive. Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin star

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the stabbing of a college activist, whose knowledge of a beef supplier's poor sanitary conditions may have led to his death. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis investigate the death of a book editor who was reputedly having an affair with one of her authors, and find themselves focusing on the lover's long-time companion, whose alibi turns out to be a tissue of lies. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A Navy Seal falls to his death while training for a secret mission and his commanding officer believes it was an accident. Analysis of the victim's equipment proves it was sabotaged, but fingerprints at the crime scene reveal nothing, prompting the agents to re-enact the sequence of events before the time allocated for the assignment runs out

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs faces an old adversary who has re-emerged with a plan to assassinate the US president and taken Kate hostage in a bid to ensure success. The FBI manages to foil the attack on the presidential helicopter, Marine One, but the case seems set to end on a downbeat note. Rudolf Martin guest stars, with Mark Harmon and Sasha Alexander

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A US Navy captain is held hostage in his own office while his wife and blind daughter are abducted, and the kidnappers try to extort a large sum of money from him for his family's release. The NCIS team is soon on the case, but initially struggles to identify the chief assailant

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The assault of a teenage girl leads to a shocking discovery. Benson has a short-lived, tragic reunion with someone from her past

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren and Eames investigate the murder of a respected nun who rescued child prostitutes and discover someone has attempted to cover up parts of the crime. They are led to a man whose half-brother was the victim of a race-hate attack 17 years previously, and begin to believe the two incidents could be linked

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Part one of two. The disappearance of a teenager unites both pairs of detectives. The investigation is complicated by the discovery that their prime suspect - now implicated in another missing persons' case - is the son of an eminent judge. Starring Kathryn Erbe, Vincent D'Onofrio, Chris Noth and Annabella Sciorra, with guest star Colm Meaney

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A popular girl at an exclusive school is murdered and an examination of her clothes reveals evidence of a substance that Adam believes could only have come from Mars. The detectives discover a male pupil is in possession of a lizard that may be responsible for the strange traces and an exploration of his link to the victim uncovers incidences of jealousy and bullying

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: An old man is fatally shot on a subway platform, but the investigation reveals the victim is in fact a woman wearing an elaborate disguise. Inquiries fail to reveal her identity, but Hawkes makes an intriguing discovery regarding the nature of the murder weapon, providing the team with a more viable lead. Meanwhile, Jo decides the time is right to tell daughter Ellie the truth about her biological mother

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: Beckett and team are called to a car park, where they examine the dead body of a courier who had been driving a bulletproof car with a secret compartment built into the floor. The victim was delivering a very important load - a Van Gogh painting bought at auction for $64million - which is now missing. Castle and Beckett work with the key witness to track down the painting and catch the killer

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: While Beckett is out of town, Castle becomes involved with Detective Slaughter in a case where a hi-tech chip has been stolen and one of Slaughter's informants is murdered

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Met Police helicopter India 99 is called to help rescue a woman who jumped into the Thames near the Palace of Westminster, as well as her two daughters, who leapt in after her. Elsewhere, the helicopter team coordinates a risky game of cat-and-mouse as police chase a group of graffiti artists across live train tracks in a patch of industrial wasteland in Battersea. The episode also looks at the case of the Hounslow Slasher, a man who in 2012 randomly attacked lone women while they were travelling home at night. Nick Wallis presents

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: The governing body of an exclusive men's club asks sleuthing scribe Jessica Fletcher to unmask the killer of a rogue member whom they suspect is one of the committee. Whodunnit, starring Angela Lansbury

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs faces an old adversary who has re-emerged with a plan to assassinate the US president and taken Kate hostage in a bid to ensure success. The FBI manages to foil the attack on the presidential helicopter, Marine One, but the case seems set to end on a downbeat note. Rudolf Martin guest stars, with Mark Harmon and Sasha Alexander

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A US Navy captain is held hostage in his own office while his wife and blind daughter are abducted, and the kidnappers try to extort a large sum of money from him for his family's release. The NCIS team is soon on the case, but initially struggles to identify the chief assailant

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the murder of a publishing executive last seen engaged in a heated argument over a taxi. They learn that the killing may have been a race hate crime, with their main suspect having a long history of prejudice. However, a technicality arises in the case, threatening to deny them the conviction. Starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate when a priest is found murdered in the confessional booth. The arrest of a teenager with a grudge seems to have them on the right track, but after discovering that the clergyman wasn't the killer's intended target they begin to focus their search on a petrol station cashier. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Conclusion of a three-part story. The investigation into a movie studio boss's murder becomes further complicated when fresh evidence points to yet another suspect. Meanwhile, the ex-husband of the deceased goes to trial to face accusations of having a hand in the crime - is an innocent man about to be convicted? Sam Waterston stars

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the case of a woman killed in a fall from her art studio rooftop. When the post-mortem reveals the presence of a drug in her system, detectives suspect she was doped - but there is a long list of suspects. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A private investigator's murder draws Briscoe and Green toward a case of corruption in a baseball league - where the manager will do anything to ensure his team wins. They learn the victim had unearthed a scandal in which an ineligible player was being fielded in every game - and his discovery may have led to his death. Detective drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis investigate the murder of a model and discover splashes of blood that obviously did not come from the victim, but suggest the culprit is a relative. With Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs investigates the discovery of a woman's mummified remains, following a trail of clues that takes him and the team to Florida, where they search for another victim who mysteriously disappeared. One of their few leads is a manual on the secret of being a good wife - which eventually points them in the direction of a serial killer

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A marine helicopter is discovered abandoned in a crop circle with its pilots missing, and witnesses report seeing strange lights in the night sky, adding to the intrigue surrounding the case. Gibbs orders the sightings to be kept under wraps for fear of attracting the attention of UFO enthusiasts, before uncovering a dark secret involving local residents. Guest starring Timothy Bottoms (The Last Picture Show)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: An investigation into the rape and murder of a woman revives harrowing memories for Ducky, who once worked on a similar case in which the killer was never captured and vowed to return. Bafflingly, both victims were civilians dressed in the uniform of a lieutenant, and each had a trident symbol carved into their neck. Starring Mark Harmon and David McCallum

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Jimmy is torn between family and work after father-in-law Ed asks him to tamper with evidence from NCIS' current murder investigation. Ed Slater's poker friend, Anthony DiNozzo Sr, offers to help with the case. Brian Dietzen, Mark Harmon, David McCallum and Robert Wagner star

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Part two of two. The investigation into the disappearance and murder of a 16-year-old girl in New York City continues and the detectives discover more about the sordid family life of the judge and his son. However, as Goren and Logan come under scrutiny over their actions they realise their suspect is doing all he can to impede their inquiries into the teenager's death. Guest starring Colm Meaney

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Logan and Barek investigate after a woman's mutilated body is found and learn she was a suspected drug smuggler who recently returned from a trip to Guatemala. Their inquiries take them to renowned plastic surgeon Dr Christine Hensel, who performed procedures on that region's poor inhabitants, but they realise she seems to be harbouring a secret. Guest starring Samantha Mathis

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Hawkes is persuaded by his girlfriend Camille to call in sick so he can join her at a food festival, but a stall explodes during the event - exposing his deception to his colleagues. The team's investigation reveals that something other than food was potentially being sold by the vendors, and a lead emerges with a link to another suspect

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The detectives suspect a woman's murder could be the work of a serial killer, while Mac reconnects with his first partner, who is being stalked by an ex-con the pair put behind bars. Crime drama, guest starring Peter Fonda, with Gary Sinise

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: When a seductive conman is killed, Castle and Beckett must investigate New York's elite. Meanwhile, Castle plans to surprise Beckett on their one-year wedding anniversary

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: The author and Beckett investigate a murder on a cruise ship and discover the vessel was being used to smuggle uncut heroin

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice. programme.desc: Documentary revealing the work of the West Midlands Ambulance Service, beginning with a distraught wife being coached over the phone on how to give CPR to her husband who collapsed suddenly at home, as crews race to save him. programme.title: Motorway Patrol
programme.desc: Documentary following members of the New Zealand highway patrol as they witness some of the best and worst behaviour on the nation's motorways. The series is centred around the roads of Auckland, the country's largest urban area, and features motoring chaos including major traffic collisions, escaped animals and pedestrians on busy roads. There is also footage of drivers falling asleep at the wheel, overloaded vehicles and suspects caught with illegal substances - plus a host of excuses as the people pulled over try to persuade officers they have not done anything wrong

programme.title: Motorway Patrol
programme.desc: Documentary following members of the New Zealand highway patrol as they witness some of the best and worst behaviour on the nation's motorways. The series is centred around the roads of Auckland, the country's largest urban area, and features motoring chaos including major traffic collisions, escaped animals and pedestrians on busy roads. There is also footage of drivers falling asleep at the wheel, overloaded vehicles and suspects caught with illegal substances - plus a host of excuses as the people pulled over try to persuade officers they have not done anything wrong

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Sisko takes command of a bedraggled squadron of Starfleet troops occupying a distant Dominion communications post. Sci-fi adventure, starring Avery Brooks, Nana Visitor and Louise Fletcher

programme.title: Dork Hunters from Outer Space
programme.desc: A group of heroes try to stop aliens taking over the universe

programme.title: Zigby
programme.desc: Zara finds some interesting items as she hunts for dinosaur relics

programme.title: Zigby
programme.desc: Bertie and Zigby set off to see the baby turtles hatching on Savannah Beach, but McMee keeps falling asleep, making their journey very difficult

programme.title: Pocket Dragon Adventures
programme.desc: A group of very small dragons live with a kindly old wizard, they're not big enough to fly but that doesn't stop them having many adventures

programme.title: UBOS
programme.desc: Cassy, Vern & Gus are gifted students who go to an enchanted school to learn about magic. After receiving a book named UBOS (Ultimate Book of Spells) they soon begin their journey of a lifetime

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: The vikings end up stranded on a drifting sheet of ice in the Arctic - with a polar bear for company

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: Halvar's brother gives up violence for baking - but his old enemy is determined to face him in battle

programme.title: Dork Hunters from Outer Space
programme.desc: A group of heroes try to stop aliens taking over the universe

programme.title: Callan
programme.desc: Spy drama, starring Edward Woodward as an embittered secret agent

programme.title: Sapphire and Steel
programme.desc: Part five of eight. Sapphire and Steel subdue the changeling, but without their technician, they have no way to deconstruct the wall and defeat the creature hidden inside

programme.title: Danger Man
programme.desc: John Drake (Patrick McGoohan), a secret agent working for NATO, travels to different corners of the world in order to prevent crimes that threaten world peace

programme.title: After You've Gone
programme.desc: Jimmy enlists his mother-in-law's help in a pub quiz and they win, but the victory is short-lived when Diana realises she answered a question incorrectly. She insists on handing the money to the actual winning team, which happens to include Siobhan. Starring Nicholas Lyndhurst

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring and revealing lesser known areas of London for locals and tourists. Featuring Woolwich, Deptford and Lewisham. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.title: Clipper: Race of Their Lives
programme.desc: Behind the scenes on the record-breaking 40,000 nautical mile race around the world on 70-foot ocean racing yachts. Follow the inside story of what they go through to take part

programme.title: One Good Turn (1954)
programme.desc: A boy living in an orphanage grows up to be the institution's lovable but clumsy caretaker. He must save the children's home from a wicked property developer who wants to build a factory on the site, and tricks him into taking the kids to the seaside so he can knock the building down. Comedy, starring Norman Wisdom and Joan Rice

programme.title: The Best of Men
programme.desc: Fact-based drama about the birth of the Paralympics in 1948. Pioneering neurologist Dr Ludwig Guttmann arrives at Stoke Mandeville Hospital in Buckinghamshire and begins to transform the lives of his patients - Second World War servicemen with spinal cord injuries. He suggests using sport as a key part of their rehabilitation, and gets them involved in activities including wheelchair polo and basketball. Starring Eddie Marsan, Rob Brydon, George Mackay and Niamh Cusack

programme.title: After You've Gone
programme.desc: Jimmy enlists his mother-in-law's help in a pub quiz and they win, but the victory is short-lived when Diana realises she answered a question incorrectly. She insists on handing the money to the actual winning team, which happens to include Siobhan. Starring Nicholas Lyndhurst

programme.title: Fitness Saved My Life
programme.desc: Following his release from prison, Micquel transformed his life through fitness. Now a bodybuilding champion, he's a mission to help others

programme.title: The Food Inspectors
programme.desc: Matt Allwright and Chris Hollins follow the work of food inspectors, who protect the public from unhygienic restaurants and potentially harmful foodstuffs. In the first edition, they investigate the problem of counterfeit bottles of alcohol, which are often dangerously strong, and members of an unsuspecting family have their mealtime assessed to see whether their cooking poses any health risks. The team also examines one of the most harmful bacteria

Drama, starring Robbie Coltrane and Julie Walters

programme.title: Mad Dog Morgan (1976)
programme.desc: An Irishman seeking his fortune in the Australian Gold Rush ends up in prison when driven to robbery out of desperation. After 12 years of abuse, he is released and becomes an outlaw, determined to make society pay for his suffering - and becoming a hero to the downtrodden in the process. Fact-based Western, starring Dennis Hopper and Jack Thompson

programme.title: The Hitman's Apprentice (2012)
programme.desc: A bumbling teenager is offered a job by his mother's crime boss boyfriend. He is given the task of driving one of the gangster's business associates around town, only to find himself an assistant to a hitman on his last assignment, a mission that leads to a deadly encounter with a mysterious woman. Thriller, starring Tim Roth, Jack O'Connell and Talulah Riley

programme.title: Britain's Greatest Generation
programme.desc: The Second World War saw men from all classes unite to fight the Nazis, and this programme meets some of the last surviving pilots of the Battle of Britain. Women, who had been excluded from many jobs, worked in everything from anti-aircraft gun batteries to steel-making factories. The Blitz saw rescue workers risk all to save those trapped in bombed buildings. For many of the era's last survivors, the defiant spirit that brought the nation together remains one of their proudest moments, as this documentary reveals

programme.desc: A look back at the 1987 FA Cup final as Coventry pulled off one of the great giant killings against heavy favourites Tottenham

programme.title: FA Cup Final Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the 1989 FA Cup final between rivals Everton and Liverpool. The game was played only five weeks after the Hillsborough disaster, in which 96 Liverpool fans were killed

programme.title: FA Cup Final Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the 1990 FA Cup final replay between Crystal Palace and Manchester United. The original match finished 3-3, with substitute Ian Wright scoring two goals for the Eagles

programme.title: FA Cup Final Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the 1991 FA Cup final between Nottingham Forest and Tottenham. This was Brian Clough's first appearance in English football's showpiece fixture

programme.title: FA Cup Final Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the 1992 FA Cup final between Liverpool and Sunderland. This was the first final to feature a Second Division team since Queens Park Rangers reached the final in 1982

programme.title: FA Cup Final Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the 1993 FA Cup final replay between Arsenal and Sheffield Wednesday. The original match finished 1-1, with a goal apiece from Ian Wright and David Hirst

programme.title: FA Cup Final Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the 1994 FA Cup final between Chelsea and Manchester United, who were looking to win the competition for an eighth time, matching the record set by Tottenham Hotspur

programme.title: FA Cup Final Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the 1995 FA Cup final between Everton and holders Manchester United. United were looking to avoid having their first barren season for six years

programme.title: FA Cup Final Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the 1996 FA Cup final between Manchester United and Liverpool. Eric Cantona was looking to become the first captain from outside the British Isles to lift the trophy

programme.title: FA Cup Final Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the 1997 FA Cup final between Chelsea and Middlesbrough. Chelsea, managed by Ruud Gullit, went in to the match hoping to win their first major trophy in 27 years

programme.title: FA Cup Final Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the 1998 FA Cup final between Arsenal and Newcastle. The Gunners were looking to emulate the famous 1971 league and cup double winning side

programme.title: FA Cup Final Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the 1999 FA Cup final between Manchester United and Newcastle. The Reds entered the match as Premier League champions having clinched the title the previous weekend

programme.title: FA Cup Final Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the 2000 FA Cup final between Aston Villa and Chelsea, the last final to be played at the old Wembley Stadium. This was Aston Villa's first final appearance since 1957

programme.title: FA Cup Final Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the 2001 FA Cup final between Arsenal and Liverpool at the Millennium Stadium, the first final in which the managers of both teams were from outside the British Isles

programme.title: FA Cup Final Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the 2002 FA Cup final between Arsenal and Chelsea. Freddie Ljungberg was aiming to become the first man to score in successive Cup finals since Bobby Smith for Spurs

programme.title: FA Cup Final Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the 2003 FA Cup final between Arsenal and Southampton at the Millennium Stadium. The final was the first to be played indoors; the roof was closed due to bad weather

programme.title: FA Cup Final Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the 2004 FA Cup final between Manchester United and Millwall. The Lions became only the second team from outside the top flight to reach the final since 1982

programme.title: FA Cup Final Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the 2005 FA Cup final between Arsenal and Manchester United. This was the first final to have been decided via penalty shootout

programme.title: FA Cup Final Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the 2006 FA Cup final between Liverpool and West Ham. This six-goal thriller is widely regarded as one of the greatest finals in the history of the competition

programme.title: FA Cup Final Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the 2007 FA Cup final between Chelsea and Manchester United. This was the first competitive game to be held at the new Wembley

programme.title: FA Cup Final Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the 2008 FA Cup final between Cardiff City and Portsmouth. Cardiff were hoping to become the first club from outside England's top division to win the Cup since 1980

programme.title: FA Cup Final Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the 2009 FA Cup final between Chelsea and Everton. The Toffees were looking to win their first piece of major silverware since winning this competition in 1995

programme.title: FA Cup Final Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the 2010 FA Cup final between Chelsea and Portsmouth. Newly crowned Premier League champions Chelsea were looking to win the double for the first time in their history

programme.title: EFL Highlights
programme.desc: Brentford v Yeovil Town. Action from the 2012/13 League One play-off final at Wembley Stadium, where the remaining place in the following season's Championship was decided. Brentford agonisingly missed out on automatic promotion on the final day of the regular campaign, but recovered to defeat Swindon Town on penalties in their semi-final, while Yeovil were 2-1 aggregate victors over Sheffield United

programme.title: EFL Highlights
programme.desc: Bradford City v Northampton Town. Action from the 2012/13 League Two play-off final at Wembley Stadium, where promotion to League One awaited the winners. The Bantams were making their second appearance of the season at Wembley having also reached the League Cup final following an outstanding giant-killing run, and they needed to come from behind to edge out Burton Albion to reach this stage. The Cobblers ended a run of recent poor form to win 1-0 in both legs of their semi-final against Cheltenham Town to move within one match of reaching the third tier of English football

programme.title: EFL Highlights
programme.desc: Crystal Palace v Watford. Action from the 2012/13 Championship play-off final at Wembley Stadium, as the teams contested a place in the top flight alongside the already promoted Cardiff City and Hull City. Palace reached this match when Wilfried Zaha scored a brace in a 2-0 away win against Brighton & Hove Albion after a goalless draw in the first leg. Meanwhile, Watford bounced back from narrowly missing out on automatic promotion by overcoming Leicester City in dramatic fashion, with Troy Deeney scoring an injury time-winner on the counter after Manuel Almunia had saved a penalty
